name: Kubernetes Lab Environment
updateContentCommand: sudo curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/kubectl https://dl.k8s.io/release/v1.31.0/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubectl && sudo curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/kind https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/dl/v0.24.0/kind-linux-amd64 && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kind
postStartCommand: until docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; do echo 'Waiting for Docker...'; sleep 1; done; kind get clusters | grep -q lab-cluster || kind create cluster --name lab-cluster
